title: Windows Remote System Discovery
description: Detects commands and tools used to discover remote systems on the network. Attackers perform network sweeps, ARP scans, and DNS lookups to identify targets for lateral movement.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*arp.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*-a*') or (('Command Line' like '*for /l*' or 'Command Line' like '*ping -n 1*')) or ('Process Name' like '*nslookup.exe') or (('Command Line' like '*Test-Connection*' or 'Command Line' like '*Test-NetConnection*' or 'Command Line' like '*Resolve-DnsName*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-ADComputer*')) or (('Command Line' like '*nbtscan*' or 'Command Line' like '*nbtstat -a*')))
